pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:12 and export_result.sh:6 both define PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/proxy-refactor"

Verified across multiple scripts: (1) setup_task.sh:51 TODO comment references ${BACKEND_URL}, (2) export_result.sh:7 defines TEST_INJECTION_VALUE and line 69 uses BACKEND_URL environment variable, (3) verifier.py:81 checks for BACKEND_URL in compose_content, (4) task.json description specifies using BACKEND_URL environment variable

privileged_info_summary: The task 'nginx_template_config_refactor@1' uses the Nginx Docker image official template feature (files in /etc/nginx/templates/ with .template suffix) to support environment variable substitution. The setup creates a synthetic project at /home/ga/proxy-refactor with a docker-compose.yml that uses real Docker images (traefik/whoami:v1.10 as backend, nginx:alpine as proxy). The task verifies proper configuration by injecting the environment variable BACKEND_URL (with test value http://verification-test:9999) and confirming it appears in the generated Nginx configuration. All three metadata claims are accurate and consistently used throughout the task setup and verification scripts.
